message:
fix(password): reject invalid base64 characters instead of silently skipping (bd-2tcq)

The base64_decode function previously used filter_map to skip invalid
characters, which could silently produce incorrect decoded output from
corrupted input. Now returns None immediately on any invalid character,
ensuring password hash verification fails explicitly rather than
producing wrong comparisons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
